name: blindkey
description: Secure credential injection and default-deny filesystem gating for AI agents. Credentials injected server-side, content scanned for leaked secrets.

tools.name: bk_proxy
tools.description: Make authenticated API request. Credential injected server-side.

tools.name: bk_list_secrets
tools.description: List available secret references. Values are never shown.

tools.name: bk_fs_read
tools.description: Read a file. Requires explicit grant. Sensitive paths blocked.

tools.name: bk_fs_write
tools.description: Write a file. Content scanned for secrets — blocked if detected.

tools.name: bk_fs_list
tools.description: List directory contents. Only unlocked directories.
